subcategory: multi-series grouped bar chart with animated statistics
use_cases: Displaying comparative analytics across multiple data series over time periods
Visualizing grouped metrics with animated statistical summaries in dashboards
Showing performance comparisons with trend indicators and percentage changes
Rendering time-series categorical data with interactive legend and tooltips
ai_summary: A multi-series grouped bar chart component built with Reaviz that displays comparative data across categories with animated count-up statistics, trend indicators, and percentage change metrics. Uses framer-motion for scroll-based entrance animations and supports detailed metric breakdowns with custom icons. Ideal for dashboard analytics in SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms requiring visual data comparison.
